sentences.arabic: تَجَلَّى صِدْقُ التَّوَكُّلِ عَلَى اللهِ فِي مَوْقِفِ الصِّدِّيقِ أَبِي بَكْرٍ رَضِيَ اللهُ عَنْهُ حِينَ كَانَ مَعَ النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ فِي الْغَارِ.
sentences.translation: Istinsko pouzdanje u Allaha manifestovalo se u stavu Siddika, Ebu Bekra, radijallahu anhu, dok je bio sa Vjerovjesnikom, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, u pećini.
sentences.translationEn: True reliance on Allah was manifested in the stance of al-Siddiq, Abu Bakr, may Allah be pleased with him, while he was with the Prophet, peace and blessings be upon him, in the cave.

sentences.arabic: فَعِنْدَمَا أَحَاطَ الْمُشْرِكُونَ بِالْمَكَانِ وَدَنَوْا مِنْهُمْ كَثِيرًا، خَشِيَ أَبُو بَكْرٍ عَلَى سَلَامَةِ الرَّسُولِ الْكَرِيمِ، فَقَالَ: لَوْ أَنَّ أَحَدَهُمْ نَظَرَ تَحْتَ قَدَمَيْهِ لَأَبْصَرَنَا.
sentences.translation: Kada su mušrici opkolili mjesto i veoma im se približili, Ebu Bekr se uplašio za sigurnost plemenitog Poslanika, pa je rekao: 'Da je neko od njih pogledao ispod svojih nogu, vidio bi nas.'
sentences.translationEn: When the polytheists surrounded the place and drew very close to them, Abu Bakr feared for the safety of the noble Messenger and said: 'If one of them were to look beneath his feet, he would see us.'

sentences.arabic: فَأَجَابَهُ النَّبِيُّ بِيَقِينٍ ثَابِتٍ أَنَّ اللهَ مَعَهُمَا وَلَنْ يَخْذُلَهُمَا أَبَدًا. [أَخْرَجَهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ مَنَاقِبِ الْأَنْصَارِ].
sentences.translation: Poslanik mu je odgovorio sa čvrstim ubjeđenjem da je Allah s njima i da ih nikada neće ostaviti na cjedilu. [Zabilježio Buhari u Knjizi o vrlinama ensarija].
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet answered him with firm certainty that Allah was with them and would never forsake them. [Reported by al-Bukhari in the Book of the Merits of the Ansar].

sentences.arabic: وَيُعَلِّمُنَا هَذَا الْمَوْقِفُ أَنَّ الثِّقَةَ بِاللهِ هِيَ السَّلَاحُ الْأَقْوَى فِي مُوَاجَهَةِ الصِّعَابِ وَالْأَزَمَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Ova situacija nas uči da je povjerenje u Allaha najjače oružje u suočavanju sa poteškoćama i krizama.
sentences.translationEn: This situation teaches us that trust in Allah is the strongest weapon in facing difficulties and crises.

sentences.arabic: كَمَا يُبَيِّنُ لَنَا فَضْلَ أَبِي بَكْرٍ وَعُمْقَ إِيمَانِهِ، إِذْ كَانَ رَفِيقَ الدَّرْبِ فِي أَحْلَكِ الظُّرُوفِ.
sentences.translation: Također nam pokazuje odliku Ebu Bekra i dubinu njegovog imana, jer je bio saputnik u najtežim okolnostima.
sentences.translationEn: It also demonstrates the virtue of Abu Bakr and the depth of his faith, as he was the companion on the path during the darkest circumstances.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ التَّوَكُّلَ لَا يَعْنِي تَرْكَ الْأَسْبَابِ، بَلْ هُوَ اعْتِمَادُ الْقَلْبِ عَلَى الْمُسَبِّبِ مَعَ الْأَخْذِ بِالْوَسَائِلِ الْمُمْكِنَةِ.
sentences.translation: Tevekkul (pouzdanje) ne znači ostavljanje uzroka, već je to oslanjanje srca na Onoga koji uzroke stvara, uz poduzimanje mogućih sredstava.
sentences.translationEn: Reliance (Tawakkul) does not mean abandoning means, but rather the heart's dependence on the Causer of causes while taking possible measures.

sentences.arabic: وَفِي ذَلِكَ دَرْسٌ بَلِيغٌ لِكُلِّ مُسْلِمٍ يَمُرُّ بِضِيقٍ، بِأَنَّ مَعِيَّةَ اللهِ لِأَوْلِيَائِهِ حَقِيقَةٌ لَا رَيْبَ فِيهَا.
sentences.translation: U tome je rječita lekcija za svakog muslimana koji prolazi kroz tjeskobu, da je Allahova podrška Njegovim štićenicima istina u koju nema sumnje.
sentences.translationEn: In this is a profound lesson for every Muslim experiencing distress: that Allah's companionship with His allies is an undeniable reality.

sentences.arabic: فَالنَّصْرُ وَالتَّمْكِينُ يَأْتِيَانِ لِمَنْ صَدَقَ مَعَ اللهِ وَتَوَكَّلَ عَلَيْهِ حَقَّ التَّوَكُّلِ.
sentences.translation: Pobjeda i osnaživanje dolaze onome ko je iskren prema Allahu i ko se na Njega oslanja onako kako dolikuje.
sentences.translationEn: Victory and empowerment come to those who are truthful with Allah and rely on Him as He deserves.

sentences.arabic: لِذَا، يَنْبَغِي لَنَا الِاقْتِدَاءُ بِالصَّحَابَةِ الْكِرَامِ فِي قُوَّةِ يَقِينِهِمْ وَتَسْلِيمِهِمْ لِأَمْرِ اللهِ.
sentences.translation: Zato se trebamo ugledati na plemenite ashabe u snazi njihovog ubjeđenja i pokornosti Allahovoj odredbi.
sentences.translationEn: Therefore, we should emulate the noble Companions in the strength of their certainty and submission to Allah's command.
